title: Hormuz reopening, end of blockade, Lebanon ceasefire: What's in the 14-point US-Iran peace deal
content: A draft memorandum between the US and Iran reportedly includes an immediate end to military operations, lifting of sanctions on oil exports, and a $300 billion reconstruction package. The agreement, expected to be signed June 19, focuses on ending hostilities and paving the way for future nuclear talks.

title: Noida Int'l Airport begins commercial operations; first IndiGo flight lands at Jewar
content: Noida International Airport commenced commercial operations today with an IndiGo flight from Lucknow, marking a significant achievement for the greenfield project. Farmers who provided land for the airport were among the inaugural passengers. The airport aims to become a major aviation and cargo hub, fostering economic growth and easing traffic at Delhi's IGI Airport.

title: Another start, another miss: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi falls for 21 against Sri Lanka A
content: Teenage batting sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi once again failed to convert a promising start into a substantial score for India A.  After racing to 21 off 14 balls against Sri Lanka A, he was caught at point. This follows similar dismissals in previous matches, highlighting a recurring pattern of quick starts but a lack of significant conversion.

title: US-Iran peace deal lifts markets: Asian stocks soar, dollar slides, oil tumbles & gold jumps 2%
content: Global markets surged as the US and Iran announced a framework agreement to end their conflict, leading to hopes of lower energy prices and easing inflation. The Strait of Hormuz reopened, causing oil prices to tumble and boosting investor appetite for riskier assets. Asian equities rallied significantly, while the US dollar weakened against major currencies.

title: World’s first trillionaire Elon Musk explains why AI will make money useless
content: Elon Musk, now a trillionaire, envisions a future where AI and robots create such abundance that money becomes obsolete. He believes automated production will drive prices to near zero, rendering traditional wages and currency irrelevant. To ensure access to this automated wealth, Musk advocates for a 'universal high income' for all citizens.

title: Almost a year after giving engineers Claude and Cursor, Disney says: Minimise AI-coded products
content: Disney is urging its engineers to use AI tools like Claude and Cursor efficiently, focusing on boosting development speed without compromising code quality. The company aims to prevent AI-generated products from failing post-release, emphasizing productivity over excessive AI token usage. This strategic push follows a failed billion-dollar partnership with OpenAI.

title: FCAS opportunity? What PM Modi and Macron's defence push could mean for 6th-generation fighter
content: India and France are set to co-design, co-develop, and co-produce advanced defence platforms, particularly next-generation fighter jets. This strategic partnership follows France's split with Germany on a similar project, with India's dual-capable military aligning perfectly with French requirements. The collaboration aims to maximize local content and manufacturing in India, bolstering indigenous capabilities and shaping the future of aerial combat.

title: 'Not sure they will go very far': Ashwin's bold verdict after India beat Pakistan
content: Ravichandran Ashwin expressed doubts about India's T20 World Cup 2026 prospects despite a dominant win over Pakistan. He cited a lack of power-hitting depth compared to rivals like Australia and England.  The article highlights Smriti Mandhana's crucial 68, Richa Ghosh's explosive 34*, and Deepti Sharma's historic 5/10 haul, which secured a 64-run victory.

title: 'No judgement': Trump got 'pissed off' with Netanyahu over Lebanon strike just an hour before deal
content: US President Donald Trump announced a finalized deal with Iran to end their conflict, despite a last-minute Israeli strike in Beirut that he claims nearly derailed the agreement. Trump expressed anger at Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu's actions, calling them "f*****g attack" with "no f*****g judgement." Despite the tensions, the deal is set for signing, with Iran still vowing retaliation.

title: 'It's respect': Japanese fans win hearts again with touching WC tradition - Watch
content: Japanese football fans captivated the world by cleaning stadium stands after a thrilling 2-2 World Cup draw against the Netherlands. This heartwarming tradition, rooted in respect for players and venues, saw supporters use blue bags to collect litter. The gesture, first seen in 1998, highlights a unique aspect of Japanese sporting culture, leaving AT&T Stadium spotless.

title: Somvati Amavasya on June 15: Date, timings, puja rituals and significance
content: Somvati Amavasya, a significant day in Sanatan Dharma for honoring ancestors, falls on June 15, 2026. This powerful New Moon day is observed with rituals like pitru tarpan, charity, and worship of Lord Shiva and the peepal tree. Devotees also engage in spiritual bathing and feeding cows and crows.

title: Jude Bellingham caught up in Ashlyn Castro family drama
content: Ashlyn Castro, the girlfriend of England and Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham, is facing a public family dispute after her mother, Tina Marie Young, claimed she is living in a homeless shelter in Los Angeles. Young accused Castro of abandoning her and making false statements about her mental health. Castro has previously denied those allegations and defended her position publicly.

title: Johnny Placide questions VAR after Haiti penalty appeals rejected
content: Haiti captain Johnny Placide criticized VAR after two second-half handball appeals involving Scotland defender Grant Hanley were not reviewed during Scotland’s 1-0 Group C win in Boston. Jean-Ricner Bellegarde also questioned the decisions. Placide said Haiti respected Scotland’s victory but wanted transparency and clear explanations from match officials regarding the two controversial incidents.

title: Clavicular’s resurfaced 2025 Miami prediction missed the full story
content: An old July 2025 video of Clavicular resurfaced on X on June 14, 2026. In the clip, he talked about moving to Miami, building a business, and enjoying club life. Many people noticed that parts of that vision later became reality. The video has sparked discussion about his career, appearance changes, business ventures, and the path he has taken since then.

title: Trump turns 80: UFC cage fight, Iran deal, fighter jet flyover mark his birthday - watch
content: President Donald Trump celebrated his 80th birthday with a UFC fight card on the White House South Lawn. The event, "UFC Freedom 250", also marked the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence. Thousands gathered to watch cage fights. The White House grounds were transformed into an outdoor arena for the spectacle. This unusual sporting event occurred shortly after an agreement was announced to end the war with Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The elaborate setup involved significant investment and labor.

title: Tear gas, burning Tesla and smashed windows: 20,000 protest G7 summit in Geneva ahead of Trump's arrival
content: Geneva witnessed clashes as thousands protested the G7 summit, with police using tear gas against stone-throwing demonstrators. While most of the 20,000 marchers remained peaceful, a "Black Bloc" of militants caused damage, including setting a car ablaze and smashing bank windows. Organizers had prepared extensively, but violence erupted, leading to arrests and heightened security for the upcoming summit in France.

title: Nitish Kumar Reddy eyes bigger role as India search for Hardik Pandya backup
content: Indian team management sees Nitish Kumar Reddy as a potential seam-bowling allrounder.  He is being developed as an alternative for the injury-prone Hardik Pandya.  Reddy recently impressed with his bowling against Afghanistan. He is actively working on improving his bowling skills.  This development aims to strengthen the Indian team's options.

title: Trump says US-Iran peace pact is complete; Switzerland to host signing ceremony on June 19
content: The US president also celebrated the expected resumption of maritime traffic and oil exports, posting, “Ships of the World, start your engines. Let the oil flow!” Trump's announcement came just hours before a UFC event at the White House being held to mark his 80th birthday. Just mintues before the Trump's official declaration, Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif had already made the agreement official.

title: How a woman who was mocked for her short height by almost everybody found love
content: Aashna Kushwaha endured relentless bullying and mockery due to her short stature throughout her childhood and adolescence. Despite facing humiliation, rejection, and even being disowned by her parents, she found strength and self-acceptance. Her journey highlights the resilience of the human spirit in overcoming societal judgment and defining one's own worth.

title: Diallo's 90th-minute strike breaks Ecuador hearts in Ivory Coast's winning return
content: Amad Diallo's dramatic 90th-minute strike secured a 1-0 victory for Ivory Coast against Ecuador in their FIFA World Cup return. The Manchester United winger's brilliant left-footed effort broke a tense stalemate, handing Les Éléphants a crucial three points in Group E. The win puts Ivory Coast level with Germany after their opening match.

title: 12 killed after skydiving plane crashes near Missouri airport in US
content: According to Highway Patrol Sergeant Justin Ewing, the aircraft was transporting skydivers when it went down. Emergency services received reports at around 11.30am local time that a plane had crashed and caught fire. Firefighters quickly brought the blaze under control, but Ewing described the scene as "brutal". The aircraft came down in a field next to the airport, prompting authorities to close nearby roads as a precaution.

title: ‘Drugs available’: Murder accused livestreams from Punjab jail; watch
content: An Hoshiarpur jail inmate, accused in multiple cases, livestreamed videos from prison alleging drug supply, even displaying what he claimed was methamphetamine. He accused officials of complicity and challenged authorities to reveal names. The incident has sparked outrage, with opposition parties questioning the government's law and order claims and anti-drug campaign.

title: Deepti Sharma sets world record with historic five-for against Pakistan
content: Deepti Sharma achieved a career-best 5/10 and became the highest wicket-taker in Women's T20 Internationals. Her bowling masterclass helped India defeat Pakistan by 64 runs in their T20 World Cup opener. Smriti Mandhana and Richa Ghosh powered India to a strong total earlier. India began their campaign with an emphatic win.

title: 2x trade in 5 years, nuclear cooperation: Modi-Macron Nice meet
content: Adoption of an innovation roadmap to deepen cooperation in critical and emerging technology, launch of an economic security dialogue, another working group for AI governance and a declaration to double bilateral trade in the next five years were among the 13 outcomes announced after the meeting. Both sides also looked to ramp up defence cooperation, consistent with India’s Make in India initiative.

title: Oil prices tumble 4% as Trump announces Iran deal, Hormuz reopening; Brent falls below $85
content: Oil prices plummeted as President Trump declared the Iran deal finalised, announcing the immediate, toll-free reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. This move eases fears of energy supply disruptions, with Brent crude and WTI futures seeing significant drops. The breakthrough follows intensive diplomatic efforts, promising a return to normal oil flow through the vital shipping route.

title: FIFA WC: Curaçao script history before Germany's seven-goal blitz seals emphatic win
content: Germany launched their World Cup campaign with a resounding 7-1 victory over debutants Curaçao. Despite a spirited first-half display from the Caribbean nation, marked by their historic first World Cup goal, Germany's superior quality ultimately prevailed. Kai Havertz and Julian Musiala were among the scorers as the four-time champions began their redemption mission with a dominant performance.

title: Why one former Meta employee believes AI is reshaping careers faster than expected
content: When 24-year-old former Meta data scientist Moyan Chen was laid off, she saw it as more than a job loss—it was a wake-up call about AI’s growing impact on careers. In an interview with Business Insider, Chen reflected on how automation is reshaping traditional tech roles, why she no longer sees corporate jobs as secure, and why future professionals must develop broader, adaptable skill sets. Her journey highlights the changing realities of work in the AI era.

title: To Mars with Musk: Can world's first trillionaire take you to the little red planet?
content: Elon Musk's ambitious plan to establish a permanent human settlement on Mars faces monumental challenges. SpaceX's Starship is designed for this, but orbital refuelling and survival on the harsh red planet are critical hurdles. Despite setbacks, testing progresses, with uncrewed cargo missions eyed for 2028, followed by potential human landings.

title: NEET leak & jobs: Rahul Gandhi to hold town halls across nation
content: Congress has planned a national outreach that will seek to unite students beyond political affiliations and provide a platform for the affected youth to share their experiences and demand accountability for “repeated examination failures and paper leak scandals”. AICC general secretary KC Venugopal said Rahul will also be holding conventions in Allahabad (July 10), Patna (July 11), and Delhi (July 14).

title: Mandhana scripts history, joins Harmanpreet and Mithali Raj to become ...
content: Mandhana scored 68 off 44 balls and shared a 91-run partnership with captain Harmanpreet Kaur (36 off 35 balls) after India were reduced to 18 for 2 early in the innings. Richa Ghosh then added 34 off 17 balls to give India a strong finish.

title: Rescued 14 Indians from sinking dhow that suffered engine snag, says US
content: S Naval Forces Central Command/US 5th Fleet reposted a news report about the rescue operation that said “upon receiving a distress call from the stranded sailors, a US Navy P-8 aircraft reached the spot and dropped a search-and-rescue kit that included a life raft, which the 14 mariners boarded”. Official sources said that the US Navy had alerted the shore authorities and Indian Navy that a dhow with Indian sailors was sinking about 80 nautical miles east of Ras AI Hadd off the coast of Oman.

title: 16-yr-old dies minutes after eating ‘safe’ ice cream: What happened to Adriano D’Orsi?
content: A 16-year-old Italian boy, Adriano D’Orsi, tragically died from a severe milk allergy after eating ice cream. Despite his known allergy and the staff's awareness, a suspected cross-contamination led to a fatal anaphylactic reaction. His death has devastated his community and highlighted the critical need for stringent allergen protocols in food businesses.

title: Monsoon tracker LIVE: Rain in parts of Delhi; Monsoon remains low in A.P. due to El Niño conditions
content: The monsoon activity in Andhra Pradesh has remained subdued thus far, with 17 out of the 28 districts reporting deficient rainfall between June 1 and June 14

title: Noida airport to start commercial flights from June 15 after CEO change over foreign citizenship
content: On March 28, 2026, Prime Minister Narendra Modi formally inaugurated the National Capital Region’s second airport, the Noida International Airport

title: Will voice Global South’s aspirations in G7 summit, says PM Modi ahead of trip to France, Slovakia
content: The Prime Minister said  “I am confident that my visits to France and the Slovak Republic will reinforce India’s deepening engagement with both Europe and the G7”

title: Sandalwood artisans hang on despite hardships
content: While procuring sandalwood for artisans is an expensive affair, shortage of sandal in the market has made them switch their jobs; most artisans across the State are the last in their family to be in the profession of woodcarving

title: Kerala launches ‘Priyadarshini’ free bus travel scheme for women
content: Chief Minister V.D. Satheesan inaugurates scheme at Thampanoor. Inaugural journey carrying CM and other dignitaries to Secretariat operated by women crew

title: Bidadi Township: Tussle turns intense as HDK attacks CM over wealth, terms him ‘real estate baron’
content: Mr. Kumaraswamy said the industrial townships developed in Gujarat were built on dry and uncultivable land, while the Bidadi township is proposed on ‘fertile agricultural land wrested from farmers’

title: Monsoon activity remains low in Andhra Pradesh due to El Niño conditions
content: The IMD-Amaravati forecasts light showers in isolated areas in three regions of South Coastal A.P. and Rayalaseema for the next week. However, thunderstorm activity is expected to continue across the State this week

title: Noida International Airport begins passenger flights; first IndiGo flight from Lucknow
content: IndiGo flight 6E 2278 took off from Chaudhary Charan Singh International Airport, Lucknow, at 7.12 a.m. and landed at Noida International Airport at 7.58 a.m., according to airport officials

title: ECI to begin house-to-house electoral roll revision on June 15
content: Electors also have the option of downloading, filling out, and uploading the form online, says District Collector

title: Can India protect its seafarers in the Gulf? | Explained
content: How many Indian seafarers are working in the Gulf region? What happened to the three vessels attacked by the U.S. Navy? What sanctions were imposed on some ships? Does the foreign-flag status of the vessels limit India’s options? Do international maritime laws protect civilian crews?

title: IIT Roorkee professor proposes bio-bitumen road trial in Karnataka
content: The proposal has come at a time when the cost of bitumen has increased multifold following the West Asia crisis

title: Free ride for women: A challenging balancing act awaits State, KSRTC
content: An estimate prepared by KSRTC reveals that the Corporation would incur a revenue loss of around ₹112 crore if the scheme were extended to all categories of buses, and about Rs 57 crore if it remained restricted to ordinary services in 90 days

title: KSRTC free travel for women: Everything about Priyadarshini scheme
content: This program, part of the UDF government’s ‘Indira Guarantees,’ covers seven categories of KSRTC ordinary buses, allowing women passengers to obtain ‘zero’ fare tickets without the need for identification.

title: U.S. says it helped in rescuing Indian MSV crew
content: A U.S. Navy P-8 aircraft was first on scene, responded by dropping a search and rescue kit that included a life raft, which the 14 mariners boarded

title: Auto driver’s daughter bags three gold medals in Bachelor of Physiotherapy
content: Spandhana I., daughter of an auto driver, achieved remarkable academic success by graduating with three gold medals in Bachelor of Physiotherapy from Padmashree Institute of Physiotherapy in Bengaluru this year.

title: Kolkata’s Damnatio memoriae moment
content: From pulling down statues erected by the previous Trinamool Congress government and removing symbols of the past that were dear to Mamata Banerjee, the month-old BJP government in West Bengal is changing the city’s colour-scape from white-and-blue to saffron

title: Free travel for women and transgender persons on KSRTC ‘ordinary’ services from June 15, 2026
content: Chief Minister V.D. Satheesan will flag off the ‘Priyadarshini’ free bus travel scheme at the capital

title: India, France adopt Innovation Roadmap 2030, Economic Security Dialogue
content: At bilateral meeting in French city of Nice, Prime Minister Modi and French President Macron call for fast adoption of the India-EU FTA, agree to create Joint India-France AI Working Group to expand cooperation

title: Nirmala Sitharaman inspects Bengaluru–Chennai Expressway works near Devanahalli
content: The Bengaluru–Chennai Expressway has been identified as a priority corridor under the Chennai–Bengaluru Industrial Corridor. The project originates at Hoskote near the junction of NH-4 and NH-207 in Karnataka.

title: Monsoon to advance after June 18 in Maharashtra, says Met department
content: On Saturday, the monsoon moved toward Hyderabad, coastal Odisha, parts of West Bengal, Jharkhand and Bihar

title: Four, including three children, drown as boat capsizes in the Krishna in Palnadu district; six others rescued
content: Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu expresses grief over the loss of lives, announces ex gratia of ₹5 lakh each to the next of kin of the deceased, directs the District Collector to disburse the amount immediately

title: Kakoli claims 22 Lok Sabha MPs now in dissident TMC camp, meeting scheduled with Speaker
content: Sources in the dissident camp said a meeting of the group, initially scheduled to be held in Kolkata, has been shifted to Delhi

title: Tripura CM proposes new international flight destinations from Agartala airport
content: The proposal is aimed at tagging the MBB Airport as the international airport, citing that the new terminal building has adequate facilities to be an international airport

title: Abhishek Banerjee makes second appearance before CID in West Bengal MLAs signature forgery case
content: Trinamool spokesperson and Beleghata MLA Kunal Ghosh also arrived at around 3 p.m. and appeared before the CID in the same case

title: Senior citizens group calls for action against rising elder abuse cases
content: Awareness programmes will be held on June 15 across NTR and Krishna districts in observance of World Elder Abuse Awareness Day, aiming to identify and address issues related to the mistreatment of senior citizens

title: FORTO urges exemption from TET for legally appointed teachers
content: Forum leaders cite an NCTE clarification dated August 28, 2017, which state that NCTE has not prescribed minimum qualifications before September 3, 2001, and that State recruitment rules govern teacher appointments during that period

title: Academic initiative ‘Vijayapatham’ launched to boost student performance in KGBVs
content: The programme, launched under the slogan ‘Learning is the Goal - Success is the Destination,’ aims to secure 100% pass results, increase the number of students scoring above 590 marks, and improve overall rankings

title: Microbial consortia boost yield for paddy farmer
content: A paddy farmer used them on a native variety ADT-46, and the results showed an increase in yield in the first harvest in January this year

title: Monsoon tracker highlights on June 14, 2026
content: According to the Regional Meteorological Centre in Chennai, moderate rain accompanied by thunderstorm and lightning is likely to occur in northern districts of Chennai

title: Congress questions PM’s ‘silence’ on death of Indian mariners, calls Rubio’s remarks unacceptable
content: Congress asks whether PM Narendra Modi will raise the incident off Oman coast and U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio’s “threatening” and “unacceptable” statement when he meets U.S. President next week in France.

title: Remain vigilant on SIR, Meenakshi tells Congress workers
content: Urging Booth Level Agents to closely monitor voter verification, prevent wrongful deletions and help restore eligible voters’ names

title: Eight killed as vehicle falls into well in Maharashtra
content: The vehicle is being pulled out of the well, and the injured people were being rushed to the hospital, the police say

title: Irrigation dept. to restart dredging in Korapuzha
content: The dredging work was halted following mass protests in February 2026. Residents and political parties had alleged that sand was being illegally extracted under the pretext of dredging

title: School bus safety measures yet to take off despite official directives
content: The delay has drawn criticism as some school managements had earlier revised transportation charges to improve safety infrastructure, including CCTV cameras, RFID-based student facilitation systems and GPS-enabled vehicle tracking

title: Ex-BJP MP terms Ram temple funds row ‘serious’; insult to Sanatana Dharma: Akhilesh Yadav
content: Vinay Katiyar claims that some members involved in managing the trust are “thieves”; allegations a “question mark” on faith, accountability and trust, the BJP cannot “evade responsibility”, says Congress

title: "Very Difficult Guy": Trump Says Netanyahu "Almost Derailed" Iran Peace Deal
content: The US, as well as Iran, has said that an "immediate and permanent" end to military operations on all fronts, including in Lebanon. But it could be difficult for Israel to accept, which has not been included in the peace negotiations

title: Noida International Airport Begins Flight Operations
content: Noida International Airport received its first IndiGo flight from Lucknow marking the start of operations.

title: 60 Verbal Warnings, 15 Minutes: Final Moments Before US Hit Ship With Indians
content: In a statement, US Central Command said the military gave the crew 15 minutes to get out of the engine room before the shots were fired that disabled the ship.

title: Video: Sundar Pichai Booed, Students Walk Out At Stanford Graduation Ceremony
content: As Pichai was introduced, the students stood up from their seats, waved Palestinian flags, blew whistles, and chanted slogans in protest.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Hormuz Is Reopening, But It May Never Matter Quite The Same Way Again
content: Hormuz may never carry the traffic it had prior to the war, and its significance for global supply chains may be diminished, to an extent. Here's why

title: Anthropic Staff To Meet White House Officials Over AI Model Access Dispute
content: The Trump administration ordered Anthropic to block any foreign nationals, whether inside or outside the US, from using its latest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, the company said.

title: What To Know About G7 Summit In France Where Trump Will Meet Allies
content: Hours before leaving Washington, Trump announced an agreement to end the war - a development that could change the dynamic for the G7 leaders during the talks from late Monday to Wednesday.

title: "Grave Lapse": VD Satheesan After 3 Kerala Vice Chancellors Attend RSS Event
content: The row erupted after Dr Mohanan Kunnummal (Kerala University of Health Sciences), Dr Mavoothu D (Mahatma Gandhi University), and Dr CR Prasad (Malayalam University) attended an RSS event addressed by Mohan Bhagwat, the Sarsanghchalak of the Rashtriy

title: 'Never Imagined This': Women Farmers Prepare For Their 1st Flight From Noida
content: Situated in Gautam Buddh Nagar district under the Yamuna Expressway Industrial Development Authority, the airport is among the Uttar Pradesh government's marquee infrastructure projects.

title: First Flight From Noida International Airport To Lucknow To Take Off Today
content: Situated in Gautam Buddh Nagar district under the Yamuna Expressway Industrial Development Authority, the airport is among the Uttar Pradesh government's marquee infrastructure projects

title: Iran's $12 Billion Assets Remain Sticking Point In US, Tehran Peace Deal
content: Iran's Mehr news agency quoted the 14-point memorandum of understanding to state that the US has agreed to release the frozen assets before the start of negotiations.

title: Analysis: Broad Strategy Behind Trinamool Rebels' Merger With Unknown Entity
content: The merger has also provided them time to regroup and whip up an intricate plan to wrest from Banerjee the last vestige of the party she had founded in 1998.

title: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Trump Says Peace Deal To Be Signed On Friday, Tehran Reiterates "Mistrust"
content: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei reportedly denied that a memorandum of understanding would be signed.

title: Why More Taxpayers May Receive Income Tax Scrutiny Notices This Year
content: ITR Filing AY 2025-26: Most scrutiny notices are not accusations of wrongdoing. Often, they simply seek clarification or supporting documents.

title: Rain Alert Today LIVE: Delhi Records Below-Normal Maximum Temperature, Rain Predicted For Today
content: Weather Updates Today, Heatwave, IMD Alert LIVE Updates: Delhi recorded a max temperature of 38.5C with light rainfall and thunderstorms forecast today.

title: PM Modi Shares A 'Nice' Selfie From A 'Nice' Meeting With Macron In Nice
content: PM Narendra Modi landed in this Mediterranean French city on Saturday night as part of his week-long tour of France and Slovakia.

title: Bengal MPs Think Long Term, Next Big Move In July, Hints Newest Rebel
content: "When you leave with two-thirds of the party, you cannot demand the name of that party on the first day... In July, we will make a demand to give us the Trinamool (name)," Sudip Bandopadhyay said.
